task: yes

The "session-start" and "session-end" event names mentioned in the checklist don't match the actual EventType constants in the codebase. The actual event types are "SessionStart" (not "session-start") and "SessionEnd" (not "session-end"). Consider using the correct PascalCase naming that matches the code, or clarify these are conceptual event names that agents should map to the EventType constants.
user_feedback_text: The "session-start" and "session-end" event names mentioned in the checklist don't match the actual EventType constants in the codebase.
